## Privacy Check

- [ ] Uses synthetic data only
- [ ] No private PDFs, screenshots, CSVs, statements, receipts, or tax returns
- [ ] No SSNs, tax IDs, account numbers, addresses, phone numbers, emails, or application IDs
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, cookies, or credential files
